title: Western Bank Heist Building Kit – 2875pcs West Town Flagship Model with 11 LED Lights, 6 Minifigures, Highly Detailed Western Architecture, Collectible Gift for Adults & Kids
features: 【Flagship Western Series Set】With 2875 pieces, 11 LED lights, 6 minifigures (5 with double-sided expressions), 51 printed elements, and 8 metallic gold parts, this Western Bank Heist kit represents the highest configuration in the Western series, offering collectors and enthusiasts a premium display-worthy centerpiece.

【Luxurious Western Bank Architecture】Featuring realistic stone textures, detailed bank counters, gold vault with openable doors, and fully printed money and gold bricks inside, this set provides an authentic, high-impact Western town experience that satisfies architectural enthusiasts and collectors alike.

【Thrilling Police vs. Bandit Action】Equipped with explosive window lighting effects and dynamic minifigure placement, you can recreate epic standoffs with the cunning bandits and brave bank security, immersing you in the wild, action-packed Western scenes.

【Innovative Interactive Play】Includes destructible wall mechanics for the bandit’s bank breach, trap structures for engaging role-play, and multiple quick-release panels for easy access and viewing, allowing endless storytelling, photography, and hands-on interactive fun.

【Gift-Ready & Warranty Assured】Perfect for Western series fans, collectors, or as a unique gift, this kit offers hours of creative engagement. Comes with a 2-year warranty, ensuring worry-free building and display enjoyment.
